text:
Any person who shall violate any provision of this chapter for which no penalty is otherwise provided shall be guilty of a misdemeanor.

MISCELLANEOUS PROVISIONS
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 485
##### § 485.360 — Penalty for other violations.

Any person who shall violate any provision of this chapter for which no penalty is otherwise provided shall be guilty of a misdemeanor.

MISCELLANEOUS PROVISIONS

subsections.text: Any person who shall violate any provision of this chapter for which no penalty is otherwise provided shall be guilty of a misdemeanor.
